project.title: Garage Bookshelf
project.description: Five shelf pine bookcase, walnut stain, built from clearance 1x12 boards.
project.next_step: Glue and screw the carcass, then stain. Finish before the planter box.

project.title: Patio Planter Box
project.description: Cedar planter for the patio garden, raised so the back does not have to bend.
project.next_step: Buy cedar on the next clearance run. Cut after the bookshelf is done.

project.title: Family Photo Frame
project.description: Wide mitered frame for the Dia de los Muertos altar photos.
project.next_step: Re cut the miters, the first set did not close clean. Low priority.

tools.tool: two bar clamps, need two more

workshop.note: One project at a time. The bookshelf gets finished before anything new gets cut. Learned the hard way that three half done projects is the same as zero.
